allow: Bash(npx --yes shadcn@latest init -t vite -b radix -p nova -y)
Bash(npx --yes shadcn@latest add dialog input scroll-area -y)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker compose exec frontend cat /app/src/components/chat-modal.tsx)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker compose exec frontend sh -c "head -20 /app/src/components/chat-modal.tsx")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker compose exec frontend sh -c "grep -n 'overflow-y-auto\\|ScrollArea\\|min-h-0' /app/src/components/chat-modal.tsx")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker compose exec frontend sh -c "ls /app/node_modules/.vite 2>&1; echo '---'; ls /app/node_modules/.vite/deps 2>&1 | head -5")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker compose exec frontend sh -c "rm -rf /app/node_modules/.vite")
